title: Tunisian Grilled Chicken Flatbreads
description: A flavorful and refreshing flatbread recipe inspired by Tunisian cuisine, featuring grilled chicken and crispy bread.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Season the chicken breast with salt and black pepper.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, brush the flatbreads with olive oil and grill for 1-2 minutes per side, or until lightly toasted.
Cut the grilled chicken into strips.
To assemble the flatbreads, place a piece of flatbread on a plate, then top with a few pieces of crispy bread, a few strips of grilled chicken, and a sprinkle of salt and black pepper.
Drizzle with lemon juice and serve immediately.
